THEALCHEMIST-THE_ALCHEMIST.aromaPrincipl: [sine][green]Control the variables. Record the results. Adjust the dosage[/green][/sine].
We still have more Spire to explore!
THEALCHEMIST-THE_ALCHEMIST.banter.dead.e: (Hurry up, I'm slipping away from my body...)
THEALCHEMIST-THE_ALCHEMIST.cardsModifier: Alchemist cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
THEALCHEMIST-THE_ALCHEMIST.description:
An amphibian practicer of esoteric arts.
Transmutes self-inflicted poison into power.
THEALCHEMIST-THE_ALCHEMIST.goldMonologue: [sine]Oh. Yes, I suppose that's quite a lot. Anyway—[/sine]
THEALCHEMIST-THE_ALCHEMIST.title: The Alchemist
